languages.text: "Я принял{mf||а} решение. Чернь и дальше будет обходиться примитивными протезами — дары Омниссии предназначены только для офицеров".
"I have come to a decision. The workers will continue to make do with primitive prosthetics — the Omnissiah's gifts are intended for officers only."
languages.original_text: "Я принял{mf||а} решение. Чернь и дальше будет обходиться примитивными протезами — дары Омниссии предназначены только для офицеров".

traits.locale_text: "I have come to a decision. The workers will continue to make do with primitive prosthetics — the Omnissiah's gifts are intended for officers only."
"I have come to a decision. The workers will continue to make do with primitive prosthetics — the Omnissiah's gifts are intended for officers only."
"I have come to a decision. The rabble will continue to make do with primitive prosthetics — the Omnissiah's gifts are intended for officers only."
"I have come to a decision. The workers will continue to make do with primitive prosthetics — the Omnissiah's gifts are intended for officers only."
"I have come to a decision. The workers will continue to make do with primitive prosthetics — the Omnissiah's gifts are intended for officers only."

languages.text: 「決断した。この愚民は原始的な義肢で我慢し続けなければならない。オムニシアの恩恵は将校のみが受けられるものだ」
languages.original_text: "I have come to a decision. The rabble will continue to make do with primitive prosthetics — the Omnissiah's gifts are intended for officers only."

traits.locale_text: 「決断した。この愚民は原始的な義肢で我慢し続けなければならない。オムニシアの恩恵は将校のみが受けられるものだ。」

languages.text: "Kararımı verdim. İşçiler, ilkel protezlerle idare etmeye devam edecek. Hermesih'in armağanları subaylara mahsustur."
languages.original_text: "I have come to a decision. The workers will continue to make do with primitive prosthetics — the Omnissiah's gifts are intended for officers only."

traits.locale_text: "Kararımı verdim. İşçiler, ilkel protezlerle idare etmeye devam edecek. Hermesih'in armağanları subaylara mahsustur."

languages.text: «He tomado una decisión. Los trabajadores seguirán conformándose con prótesis primitivas; los dones del Omnissiah son solo para los oficiales».
languages.original_text: "I have come to a decision. The workers will continue to make do with primitive prosthetics — the Omnissiah's gifts are intended for officers only."

traits.locale_text: «He tomado una decisión. Los trabajadores seguirán conformándose con prótesis primitivas; los dones del Omnissiah son solo para los oficiales».

languages.text: “我已经做出了决定。这群工人继续凑合着用原始义肢吧——欧姆尼赛亚的恩赐仅限军官享用。”
languages.original_text: "I have come to a decision. The workers will continue to make do with primitive prosthetics — the Omnissiah's gifts are intended for officers only."

traits.locale_text: “我已经做出了决定。这群工人继续凑合着用原始义肢吧——欧姆尼赛亚的恩赐仅限军官享用。”

languages.text: « J'ai pris ma décision. Les ouvriers continueront à se contenter de prothèses primitives. Les dons de l'Omnimessie sont réservés aux officiers. »
languages.original_text: "I have come to a decision. The workers will continue to make do with primitive prosthetics — the Omnissiah's gifts are intended for officers only."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai pris ma décision. Les ouvriers continueront à se contenter de prothèses primitives. Les dons de l'Omnimessie sont réservés aux officiers. »

languages.text: "Ich habe mich entschieden. "Die Arbeiter werden weiterhin mit primitiven Prothesen auskommen müssen — die Gaben des Omnissiah sind nur für Offiziere gedacht."
languages.original_text: "I have come to a decision. The workers will continue to make do with primitive prosthetics — the Omnissiah's gifts are intended for officers only."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe mich entschieden. "Die Arbeiter werden weiterhin mit primitiven Prothesen auskommen müssen — die Gaben des Omnissiah sind nur für Offiziere gedacht."
